---
name: setup
description: Inject subagent delegation rules into the project CLAUDE.md
---

# Subagent Setup

Detect installed subagent plugins and inject their delegation rules into the project's `CLAUDE.md`.

## Steps

1. **Read the project CLAUDE.md** — read `CLAUDE.md` at the project root (create it if it doesn't exist)

2. **Check existing section** — if a `## Delegation` section already exists, remove it entirely (it will be regenerated)

3. **Generate the delegation block** — use this exact format:

```markdown
## Delegation

<!-- Generated by /agents-fleet:setup — do not edit manually -->

| Service | Mode | Delegate to |
|---------|------|-------------|
| **Linear** (issues, projects, cycles, MCP tools) | `Agent` | `agents-fleet:Linear` |
| **Notion** (pages, databases, docs, MCP tools) | `Agent` | `agents-fleet:Notion` |
| **Git & GitHub** (commits, PRs, issues, checks, releases) | `Agent` | `agents-fleet:Git` |
| **Slack** (messages, channels, search, MCP tools) | `Agent` | `agents-fleet:Slack` |

**Need the result in your context → call directly. Otherwise → delegate.**

**`resume`**: `Agent(subagent_type="...", resume="<agentId>", prompt="...")` to follow up without re-fetching.
```

4. **Write the block** — insert the `## Delegation` section in the project CLAUDE.md (append at end, or replace if it already existed).

5. **Report** — confirm to the user that the delegation rules were added.
